title: microtropis micrantha
intro: Microtropis micrantha is a plant species, also known as small-flowered Microtropis, which is a type of flowering plant in the family Opiliaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its antimalarial, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Microtropis micrantha include its potential to treat fever, malaria, and other infections, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Microtropis micrantha can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
